mapper.sql: p.id, p.product_no, p.product_name, p.product_subtitle, p.product_type_id, (select type_name from pt_product_type where id = p.product_type_id) as typeName, p.service_type, p.category_name, p.cover_url, p.product_intro, p.target_desc, p.original_price, p.sale_price, p.member_price, p.new_user_price, p.lesson_count, p.duration_minutes, p.validity_days, p.refund_type, p.refund_rule, p.purchase_limit, p.sale_stock, p.sold_count, p.booking_gap_minutes, p.booking_capacity, p.latest_booking_hours, p.latest_free_cancel_hours, p.no_show_deduct, p.coach_confirm_required, p.sort_no, p.recommend_private, p.recommend_home, (select is_enabled from pt_installment_rule where product_id = p.id) as installmentEnabled, (select is_enabled from pt_product_group_benefit where product_id = p.id) as groupBenefitEnabled, (select gift_count from pt_product_group_benefit where product_id = p.id) as groupBenefitGiftCount, (select validity_days from pt_product_group_benefit where product_id = p.id) as groupBenefitValidityDays
mapper.select: select , p.product_detail from pt_product p where p.id = #{value} and p.deleted = 0 and p.listing_status = 1
